reviews.comment:
Vine a dejar el auto al taller de YPF boxes super temprano, asique me vine a desayunar al café. Riquísima comida, muy limpio y el personal muy amable.
Súper recomiendo hacer una parada, ya sea previo a un viaje largo/corto, para empezar bien el día camino al trabajo o mientras esperás a que terminen de trabajar en tu auto/moto.

(Translated by Google)
I dropped my car off at the YPF service station super early, so I stopped by the café for breakfast. Delicious food, very clean, and the staff was very friendly.
I highly recommend stopping by, whether before a long or short trip, to start your day off right on your way to work, or while you wait for them to finish working on your car or motorcycle.

reviews.comment:
Da gusto ir a esta full... la atención en playa super cordial (5 carita feliz xq una no alcanza), los chicos de box unos capos me super asesoraron y me re ayudaron y que se puede decir del personal del salón turno tarde noche, que es cdo voy a tomar un cafecito... 5 estrellas es poco para mi 10 estrellitas p las chicas y los muchachos que siempre me reciben con una sonrisa y mucha cordialidad.
Felicitaciones!!! Y sigan así, q en pocos lugares te atienden de 10!!

(Translated by Google)
It's a pleasure to go to this place... the service on the beach is super friendly (5 smiley faces because one isn't enough), the guys at the boxing gym are amazing, they gave me great advice and were incredibly helpful, and what can I say about the staff in the lounge during the afternoon/evening shift, which is when I go for a coffee... 5 stars isn't enough for me, 10 stars for the girls and guys who always greet me with a smile and so much friendliness.
Congratulations!!! And keep it up, because there are very few places that treat you like this!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21wcFRHTnJlSHBxZFUxeVVVbDJaM00wVmpNMmExRRAB
